drinks.name: White Mojito
steps: Muddle mint with sugar syrup in a tall glass.
Add lime juice and white rum.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently from the bottom.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.

drinks.name: Gold Mojito
steps: Muddle mint with sugar syrup in a tall glass.
Add lime juice and gold rum.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently from the bottom.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.

drinks.name: Spiced Mojito
steps: Muddle mint with sugar syrup in a tall glass.
Add lime juice and spiced rum.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently from the bottom.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.

drinks.name: Dark Mojito
steps: Muddle mint with sugar syrup in a tall glass.
Add lime juice and dark rum.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently from the bottom.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.

drinks.name: Strawberry Mojito
steps: Muddle strawberry with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh strawberry and mint.

drinks.name: Raspberry Mojito
steps: Muddle raspberry with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh raspberry and mint.

drinks.name: Blueberry Mojito
steps: Muddle blueberry with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh blueberry and mint.

drinks.name: Pineapple Mojito
steps: Muddle pineapple with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh pineapple and mint.

drinks.name: Watermelon Mojito
steps: Muddle watermelon with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh watermelon and mint.

drinks.name: Passionfruit Mojito
steps: Muddle passionfruit with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh passionfruit and mint.

drinks.name: Mango Mojito
steps: Muddle mango with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh mango and mint.

drinks.name: Peach Mojito
steps: Muddle peach with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh peach and mint.

drinks.name: Coconut Mojito
steps: Muddle coconut with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh coconut and mint.

drinks.name: Ginger Mojito
steps: Muddle ginger with sugar syrup and mint.
Add rum and lime juice and stir.
Fill with crushed ice.
Top with soda water.
Garnish with fresh ginger and mint.

drinks.name: Classic Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Shake all ingredients with ice for 12 seconds.
Strain into the salted glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

drinks.name: Spicy Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Shake all ingredients with ice for 12 seconds.
Strain into the salted glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

drinks.name: Frozen Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Blend all ingredients with ice until smooth.
Pour into the salted glass.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

drinks.name: Tommy's Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Shake all ingredients with ice for 12 seconds.
Strain into the salted glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

drinks.name: Tamarind Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Shake all ingredients with ice for 12 seconds.
Strain into the salted glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

drinks.name: Mezcal Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Shake all ingredients with ice for 12 seconds.
Strain into the salted glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

drinks.name: Classic Martini
steps: Fill a mixing glass with ice.
Add all liquids and stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with olive or lemon twist.

drinks.name: Dirty Martini
steps: Fill a mixing glass with ice.
Add all liquids and stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with three olives.

drinks.name: Vodka Martini
steps: Fill a mixing glass with ice.
Add all liquids and stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with lemon twist.

drinks.name: Vesper Martini
steps: Fill a mixing glass with ice.
Add all liquids and stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with lemon twist.

drinks.name: Espresso Martini
steps: Brew a shot of espresso and allow it to cool briefly.
Add all liquids and ice to a shaker.
Shake hard for 20 seconds to build a thick foam.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Float three coffee beans on the crema.

drinks.name: Lychee Martini
steps: Add all liquids to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a peeled lychee.

drinks.name: Apple Martini
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake well for 12 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a thin apple slice.

drinks.name: Chocolate Martini
steps: Rim the glass with cocoa powder.
Add all liquids to a shaker with ice and shake for 15 seconds.
Strain into the cocoa-rimmed glass.
Garnish with chocolate shavings.

drinks.name: Pornstar Martini
steps: Scoop passionfruit pulp into a shaker.
Add vodka, liqueur, vanilla syrup, lime juice and ice.
Shake hard for 15 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Serve with a side shot of prosecco.

drinks.name: French Martini
steps: Shake vodka, liqueur and pineapple juice with ice.
Shake hard until foamy.
Double-strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a raspberry.

drinks.name: Cucumber Martini
steps: Muddle cucumber in the shaker.
Add gin, lime juice, elderflower liqueur and ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a cucumber ribbon.

drinks.name: Dry Martini
steps: Rinse a chilled glass with vermouth and discard.
Add all liquids and stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with lemon twist.

drinks.name: Classic Old Fashioned
steps: In a rocks glass, muddle sugar with bitters and a splash of water.
Add a large ice cube and pour the bourbon whiskey.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Express an orange peel over the glass and drop it in.

drinks.name: Maple Old Fashioned
steps: In a rocks glass, muddle sugar with bitters and a splash of water.
Add a large ice cube and pour the bourbon whiskey.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Express an orange peel over the glass and drop it in.

drinks.name: Smoked Old Fashioned
steps: Smoke a rocks glass with wood chips for 10 seconds.
Add sugar cube and bitters, muddle with a splash of water.
Add a large ice cube and pour the whiskey.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Express and drop in an orange peel.

drinks.name: Rum Old Fashioned
steps: In a rocks glass, muddle sugar with bitters and a splash of water.
Add a large ice cube and pour the dark rum.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Express an orange peel over the glass and drop it in.

drinks.name: Tequila Old Fashioned
steps: In a rocks glass, muddle sugar with bitters and a splash of water.
Add a large ice cube and pour the reposado tequila.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Express an orange peel over the glass and drop it in.

drinks.name: Irish Old Fashioned
steps: In a rocks glass, muddle sugar with bitters and a splash of water.
Add a large ice cube and pour the irish whiskey.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Express an orange peel over the glass and drop it in.

drinks.name: Classic Negroni
steps: Add gin, campari and sweet vermouth to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Express an orange peel over the glass.

drinks.name: Boulevardier
steps: Add bourbon whiskey, campari and sweet vermouth to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Express an orange peel over the glass.

drinks.name: White Negroni
steps: Add gin, suze and lillet to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Express an orange peel over the glass.

drinks.name: Mezcal Negroni
steps: Add mezcal, campari and sweet vermouth to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Express an orange peel over the glass.

drinks.name: Sbagliato
steps: Add campari and sweet vermouth to an ice-filled rocks glass.
Top with prosecco and stir gently.
Garnish with an orange slice.

drinks.name: Rosita
steps: Add reposado tequila, campari and sweet vermouth to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 30 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Express an orange peel over the glass.

drinks.name: Whiskey Sour
steps: Dry-shake bourbon whiskey, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Amaretto Sour
steps: Dry-shake amaretto, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Pisco Sour
steps: Dry-shake pisco, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Gin Sour
steps: Dry-shake gin, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Rum Sour
steps: Dry-shake white rum, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Tequila Sour
steps: Dry-shake tequila, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Brandy Sour
steps: Dry-shake brandy, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Midori Sour
steps: Dry-shake midori, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Scotch Sour
steps: Dry-shake scotch whisky, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: New York Sour
steps: Dry-shake bourbon whiskey, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again for 15 seconds.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Slowly float red wine over the back of a spoon.
Add bitters on the foam and create a pattern with a pick.

drinks.name: Gin and Tonic
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the gin.
Top with tonic water.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Vodka Tonic
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Top with tonic water.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Rum and Coke
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the white rum.
Top with cola.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Whiskey Highball
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the japanese whisky.
Top with soda water.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Dark and Stormy
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the dark rum.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with ginger beer.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Moscow Mule
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with ginger beer.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Kentucky Mule
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the bourbon whiskey.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with ginger beer.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Mexican Mule
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the tequila.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with ginger beer.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: London Mule
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the gin.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with ginger beer.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Paloma
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the tequila.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with grapefruit soda.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Horsefeather
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the rye whiskey.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with ginger ale.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Pimms Cup
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the pimms.
Top with lemonade.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with cucumber, strawberry and mint.

drinks.name: Cape Codder
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with cranberry juice.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Sea Breeze
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Squeeze fresh lime juice.
Top with grapefruit and cranberry.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Madras
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Top with cranberry and orange juice.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Greyhound
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Top with grapefruit juice.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Screwdriver
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Top with orange juice.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Bay Breeze
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the vodka.
Top with pineapple and cranberry.
Stir once gently.
Garnish with a citrus wedge.

drinks.name: Aperol Spritz
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the aperol.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Campari Spritz
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the campari.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Hugo Spritz
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the elderflower cordial.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Lillet Spritz
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the lillet blanc.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: St-Germain Spritz
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the elderflower liqueur.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Limoncello Spritz
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the limoncello.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: French 75
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the gin.
Add the lemon juice and sugar syrup.
Top with champagne.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Bellini
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the peach puree.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Rossini
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the strawberry puree.
Top with prosecco.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Mimosa
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the orange juice.
Top with champagne.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Kir Royale
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the creme de cassis.
Top with prosecco.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Seelbach
steps: Fill a large glass with ice (or chill a flute).
Pour the bourbon whiskey.
Add the lemon juice and sugar syrup.
Top with champagne.
Finish with a splash of soda water.
Stir gently once. Garnish with citrus and a fresh herb.

drinks.name: Pina Colada
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until completely smooth.
Pour into a hurricane glass.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and cherry.

drinks.name: Mai Tai
steps: Shake all ingredients with crushed ice for 10 seconds.
Pour into a tiki glass without straining.
Top with more crushed ice.
Garnish with mint and a lime shell.

drinks.name: Hurricane
steps: Shake all with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a hurricane glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with an orange slice and cherry.

drinks.name: Zombie
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 10 seconds.
Strain into a tall tiki glass with crushed ice.
Garnish with mint and an orchid.

drinks.name: Blue Hawaiian
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Pour into a hurricane glass.
Garnish with pineapple, cherry and an umbrella.

drinks.name: Tequila Sunrise
steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour tequila and orange juice.
Slowly pour grenadine down the side — do not stir.
Garnish with an orange slice and cherry.

drinks.name: Caipirinha
steps: Cut lime into wedges and muddle with sugar in a rocks glass.
Add cachaca.
Fill with crushed ice and stir well.

drinks.name: Caipiroska
steps: Cut lime into wedges and muddle with sugar in a rocks glass.
Add vodka.
Fill with crushed ice and stir well.

drinks.name: Jungle Bird
steps: Shake all ingredients with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a tiki glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a pineapple leaf.

drinks.name: Painkiller
steps: Shake all with ice for 10 seconds.
Pour into a tall glass.
Grate fresh nutmeg over the top.

drinks.name: Bahama Mama
steps: Shake all with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a hurricane glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

drinks.name: Chi Chi
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Pour into a hurricane glass.
Garnish with a pineapple slice and cherry.

drinks.name: Malibu Sunset
steps: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Add coconut rum, schnapps and orange juice.
Drizzle grenadine down the side for a sunset effect.
Garnish with orange and a cherry.

drinks.name: Miami Vice
steps: Blend strawberries with rum, lime juice and ice until smooth.
In a second blender, combine rum, pineapple juice, coconut cream and ice.
Layer alternately in a hurricane glass.
Garnish with a strawberry.

drinks.name: Goombay Smash
steps: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a hurricane glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

drinks.name: Cosmopolitan
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Kamikaze
steps: Shake all ingredients with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled shot glass.

drinks.name: Lemon Drop
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Sidecar
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Between the Sheets
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Corpse Reviver #2
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: White Lady
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Dry-shake without ice, then shake again with ice.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Aviation
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Last Word
steps: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake for 12 seconds.
Double-strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: B-52
steps: Layer coffee liqueur, baileys irish cream, grand marnier slowly over the back of a spoon in a shot glass.
Serve immediately, neat.

drinks.name: Jagerbomb
steps: Build all ingredients in a shot glass.
Serve with the garnish alongside.

drinks.name: Tequila Shot
steps: Build all ingredients in a shot glass.
Serve with the garnish alongside.

drinks.name: Lemon Drop Shot
steps: Build all ingredients in a shot glass.
Serve with the garnish alongside.

drinks.name: Kamikaze Shot
steps: Build all ingredients in a shot glass.
Serve with the garnish alongside.

drinks.name: Buttery Nipple
steps: Layer butterscotch schnapps, baileys irish cream slowly over the back of a spoon in a shot glass.
Serve immediately, neat.

drinks.name: Slippery Nipple
steps: Layer sambuca, baileys irish cream slowly over the back of a spoon in a shot glass.
Serve immediately, neat.

drinks.name: Mind Eraser
steps: Build all ingredients in a shot glass.
Serve with the garnish alongside.

drinks.name: Irish Coffee
steps: Preheat a mug with hot water and discard.
Add irish whiskey, to the mug.
Fill with hot coffee.
Garnish with whipped cream.

drinks.name: Hot Toddy
steps: Preheat a mug with hot water and discard.
Add bourbon whiskey, lemon juice, honey, to the mug.
Fill with hot water.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and orange wheel.

drinks.name: Mulled Wine
steps: Combine wine, spices, orange zest and honey in a pot.
Heat gently for 15 minutes without boiling.
Stir in brandy at the end of heating.
Ladle into mugs and garnish with orange and cinnamon.

drinks.name: Hot Buttered Rum
steps: Preheat a mug with hot water and discard.
Add dark rum, butter and spices, to the mug.
Fill with hot water.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and orange wheel.

drinks.name: Tom and Jerry
steps: Beat egg yolk with sugar until pale; whip the white until stiff.
Fold them together with a pinch of nutmeg.
Spoon the batter into a mug with brandy and rum.
Top with hot milk and stir gently.

drinks.name: Frozen Daiquiri
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Garnish appropriately.

drinks.name: Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Garnish appropriately.

drinks.name: Frozen Banana Daiquiri
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Garnish appropriately.

drinks.name: Frozen Mango Daiquiri
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Garnish appropriately.

drinks.name: Frozen Peach Margarita
steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Garnish appropriately.

drinks.name: Frozen Pina Colada
steps: Blend until smooth.
Pour into a hurricane glass.
Garnish with pineapple and cherry.

drinks.name: Grasshopper
steps: Shake all ingredients with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with shaved chocolate.

drinks.name: Mudslide
steps: Blend all ingredients until thick.
Drizzle chocolate syrup inside a hurricane glass.
Pour in the blend.
Top with whipped cream.

drinks.name: White Russian
steps: Build vodka and coffee liqueur over ice in a rocks glass.
Float cream over the back of a spoon.
Do not stir — serve layered.

drinks.name: Black Russian
steps: Build over ice in a rocks glass.
Stir gently.

drinks.name: Brandy Alexander
steps: Shake all with ice for 12 seconds.
Strain into a chilled coupe.
Grate nutmeg on top.

drinks.name: Golden Cadillac
steps: Shake all with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled coupe.

drinks.name: Pink Squirrel
steps: Shake all with ice for 10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled coupe.

drinks.name: Godfather
steps: Build over a large ice cube in a rocks glass.
Stir gently.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Godmother
steps: Build over a large ice cube in a rocks glass.
Stir gently.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Rusty Nail
steps: Build over a large ice cube in a rocks glass.
Stir gently.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Stinger
steps: Build over a large ice cube in a rocks glass.
Stir gently.
Garnish with a citrus twist.

drinks.name: Tom Collins
steps: Add gin, lemon juice and syrup to a shaker with ice.
Shake briefly for 6 seconds.
Pour into a collins glass with fresh ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently.
Garnish with a lemon wheel and cherry.

drinks.name: John Collins
steps: Add bourbon whiskey, lemon juice and syrup to a shaker with ice.
Shake briefly for 6 seconds.
Pour into a collins glass with fresh ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently.
Garnish with a lemon wheel and cherry.

drinks.name: Vodka Collins
steps: Add vodka, lemon juice and syrup to a shaker with ice.
Shake briefly for 6 seconds.
Pour into a collins glass with fresh ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently.
Garnish with a lemon wheel and cherry.

drinks.name: Captain Collins
steps: Add white rum, lemon juice and syrup to a shaker with ice.
Shake briefly for 6 seconds.
Pour into a collins glass with fresh ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently.
Garnish with a lemon wheel and cherry.

drinks.name: Gin Fizz
steps: Add gin, lemon and syrup to shaker.
Add ice and shake hard for 20 seconds.
Strain into a chilled highball glass.
Top with cold soda water.
Serve immediately.

drinks.name: Ramos Gin Fizz
steps: Dry-shake without ice for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake hard for 20 seconds.
Strain into a chilled highball glass.
Top with cold soda water.
Serve immediately.

drinks.name: Sloe Gin Fizz
steps: Add gin, lemon and syrup to shaker.

drinks.name: Diamond Fizz

Add ice and shake hard for 20 seconds.

drinks.name: Mint Julep

Add bourbon and crushed ice.

drinks.name: Rum Punch

steps: Add all ingredients except grenadine to a shaker with ice.

Refrigerate overnight.

drinks.name: Queen's Park Swizzle

Add lime juice, rum and crushed ice.
Swizzle with a swizzle stick until the glass frosts over.
Top with more crushed ice.
Crown with bitters.

drinks.name: Rum Swizzle

Swizzle with a swizzle stick until the glass frosts over.

Pour the vodka.

drinks.name: Whiskey Ginger
